children.name:
Timed out after waiting `60000ms` for your remote page to load.

Your page did not fire its `load` event within `60000ms`.

You can try increasing the `pageLoadTimeout` value in `Users\CT_USER\source\repos\Automation\Typescript-cypress-Template\cypress.config.ts` to wait longer.

Browsers will not fire the `load` event until all stylesheets and scripts are done downloading.

When this `load` event occurs, Cypress will continue running commands.
